title: Franklin and the Turtle Lake Treasure
original_title: Franklin et le trésor du lac
overview: When his Granny comes down with a mysterious ailment, Franklin and his friends must search for the treasure of Turtle Lake. This is said to be a talisman that can cure the illness.
